description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21 (LTS), update build configuration (pom.xml or build.gradle) to target Java 21, migrate deprecated APIs, and ensure compatibility with Java 21 features and requirements
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded PhotoAlbum-Java to Java 21 LTS. Updated pom.xml: Spring Boot 2.7.18 → 3.2.5, java.version/compiler source & target 8 → 21. Migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.* imports to jakarta.* in Photo.java. Updated Dockerfile base images from eclipse-temurin:8 to eclipse-temurin:21. Build succeeded and all unit tests passed.
